title: Essential Tools for Macrame
excerpt: Discover the must-have tools that will make your macrame journey easier and more enjoyable.

steps.title: Cutting tools
steps.description: Invest in sharp fabric scissors - dull blades fray the cord. A rotary cutter works great for bulk cutting.

steps.title: Mounting setup
steps.description: A clothing rack with S-hooks lets you work at comfortable height and move projects easily.

steps.title: Finishing tools
steps.description: A wire pet brush or wide-tooth comb creates beautiful fringes. Use fabric stiffener for extra hold.

steps.title: Hardware
steps.description: Stock up on wooden rings, dowels, driftwood, and metal hoops in various sizes.

tips: A clipboard is perfect for small projects like jewelry
Use tape to mark measurements on your work surface
